criteria.description: The function header must match exactly the specified in types of parameters and return. The matching of the name of the function or the parameter names can be ignored.

rules.description: The function parameters number have been altered.
The function parameter types has been altered.
The function return types has been altered.

criteria.description: The function must be used in the code.

rules.description: The function is defined but never used.

criteria.description: The implementation must fulfill exactly the purpose of the function. When the implementation is similar but not exact is valid too.

rules.description: The logic is scattered but resolves the essential part (-0,25 per major mistake).
Only part of the purpose is met.
There is no implementation or it does not fulfill the purpose.

criteria.description: The function is implemented in another place of the code. This rule works as exception to the previous penality giving a positive grade instead of negative, substituting the previous grades.

rules.description: The functionality of the function is defined in another function or in the main function.
The functionality is partialy defined in another function or in the main function.
